statement.en: Flame propagation limit and consumption speed of hydrogen-air flame in narrow channels

proposer: Mejía-Botero, C, C, L Pratabuy Tran-Quang, Z. K. Chen et al.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Paper categorized as cs.AI but addresses physical flame propagation (combustion physics). Metadata is inconsistent—combustion in narrow channels is a physics/engineering domain, not computer science. Abstract content missing prevents full evaluation. Classification suspended pending document verification and abstract review.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 火炎の速度は幅を持つ通路で、壁への拡散が抵抗として現れる神秘的な形で減速する。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 狭い通路を揺らめく火炎が前進し、壁の冷却作用に抗いながら、次第に沈黙へ向かう。
